resources.string: Pro
Thuthukisa i-SD Maid SE
SD Maid SE Pro inikeza imiphumela engcono, izici eziningi kanye nezinketho zabasebenzisi abaphezulu.
Thuthukisa
Google Play ayitholakali

SD Maid ayikwazi ukuxhuma ku-Google Play. Ingabe Google Play ifakiwe futhi isesikhathini? Ingabe i-akhawunti yakho ye-Google ingene? Zama ukusula i-cache yohlelo lokusebenza lwe-Google Play futhi uphinde uqalise idivayisi yakho.
Inkinga ye-Google Play
Kube nenkinga nge-Google Play. Sicela uzame futhi kamuva noma uphinde uqalise idivayisi yakho.\n\nImininingwane: %s
Iphutha le-Google Play

Kwenzeke iphutha langaphakathi le-Google Play. Sicela uzame okulandelayo:

• Phinda uqalise idivayisi yakho
• Sula i-cache ye-Google Play Store
• Zama futhi kamuva
Iphutha lokuxhuma
Ayikwazi ukuxhuma ku-Google Play. Sicela uhlole ukuxhumeka kwe-inthanethi yakho bese uzama futhi.
Sekuthengwe kakade
Sebenzisa inketho ethi \"Buyisela ukuthenga\" ukuze ubuyisele ukuthenga kwakho. Uma inkinga iqhubeka, zama ukusula i-cache ye-Google Play uphinde uqalise idivayisi yakho.
Thola SD Maid SE Pro
SD Maid ayinayo izikhangiso futhi ayithengisi idatha yabasebenzisi. Umsebenzi wami uxhaswa nguwe ❤️.
Izinzuzo zokuthuthuka

• Uhlanzelo lwemimoya yohlelo nokususa izinto
• Ukususa amafayili aphindwe
• Ukucindezeleka kwezithombe nezividio
• Ukuswayipa ukususa izinto ezindala
• Uhlanzelo ngokunye ngewidget
• Ukuhlela uhlanzelo
• Izihlungi yokuthile kanye nokumika
• Izintombazane zokugcinwa nomlando
• Izici ezengeziwe kanye nokuphepha
• Okusekela ukubhala kokuqhubeka
Ama-opsiyini oshintshela
Izici ezifanayo, izintengo nje zahluke
noma
Isabelo semali yonyaka
Kubuya ebushe ngonyaka ngemuva komzamo wamahhala. Yekela nangaliphi ilanga ku-Google Play.
Kubuya ebushe ngonyaka. Yekela nangaliphi ilanga ku-Google Play.
Thenga okukodwa
Isipho sinye, ayikho ukubuya ebushe.
Izintengo zazikwazanga ukuloadwa manje. Hlola i-Google Play futhi zama futhi emethela.
Qala ukuhlola kwamahhala kwezinsuku eziyi-14
Bhalisela
Ukuthenga kube kanye
Ungcono kakhulu! ❤️
Buyisela ukuthenga
Usuvele uzithenguze Pro?
Kubukeka ukuthi wazamela i-Pro kule divaysi ngaphambi. Buyisela ukuthenga kwakho ukuze kubukhishwe futhi.
Ukuvumelanisa kwe-Play Store kungathatha isikhathi. Zama ukuphinde uqalise, ukusula i-cache ye-Google Play noma ulinde nje.
Ama-akhawunti amaningi angadunga i-Google Play. Faka uhlelo ngewebhusayithi ye-Google Play, ephoqa ukuhlobanisa ne-akhawunti ethile.
Izilizali!
Una %1$s, obukhishwe yi-subscription yakho.
Una %1$s, obukhishwe ng-ukuthenga kwakho kube kanye.
Ukuthenga kube kanye
Una i-Pro upgrade kube kanye. I-Pro ihlala ibukhishwe kule akhawunti ye-Google. Ngiyabonga ngokusekelela i-SD Maid ❤️.
I-Pro subscription yakho isebenza futhi ihleliwe ukubuya. Ukuhlawula kukulawulwa yi-Google Play.
Uthanda ukuthenga kube kanye? Itholakala uma i-subscription yakho ayisahleliwe ukubuya. Khansela i-subscription ku-Google Play ukuze ushintsheke.
I-Pro subscription yakho isebenza, kodwa ayihleleliwe ukubuya. I-Pro ihlala itholakala kuze kube isikhathi samanje siphelile.
Leli subscription lisahleliwe ukubuya, noma ngabe seuna i-upgrade kube kanye. Ungayikhansela ku-Google Play.
Lawula i-subscription
Loku kuthenga kuhlukahlukene: akukhanseleli noma akubuyi imali ye-subscription yakho. Sebenzisa i-akhawunti eyodwa ye-Google kubo bobabili.
I-subscription isasebenza

I-Google Play ikhaba ukuthi i-subscription yakho isahleliwe ukubuya. Ukuze kuthenga i-upgrade kube kanye, khansela i-subscription ku-Google Play okokuqala, ngemuva kwalokho buya lapha.\n\nUsanda uyakhansela? Nikeza i-Google Play isikhashana uzame futhi. Futhi qiniseka ukuthi usebenzisa i-akhawunti eyodwa ye-Google.
Ayikwazanga ukuhlola isimo se-subscription yakho ku-Google Play. Ngiyakucela uzame futhi esikhashana.
Ukuthenga buyiselwe, i-Pro upgrade yakho isebenza.
Iyacungula ukuthenga kwakho
I-Pro isasebenza. Intandeka i-Google Play ukuze iphinde icungule ukuthenga kwakho. Zonke izilungiselelo ze-Pro zihlala zibukhishwe okwamanje.

I-Pro isasebenza, kodwa i-Google Play ayikacunguli ukuthenga kwakho isikhathi. Uma uthenga i-Pro, buyisela ukuthenga futhi uhlole ukuthi i-Google Play isebenzisa i-akhawunti eya kuthenga yona. Uma i-subscription iphelile noma ukuthenga kubuyelwe imali, i-Pro izozivala yiyo, ayikho okumele ukuwenza.
Ukulungisa kucela i-Google Play ukuhlola futhi izinto ozithengile nge-akhawunti yakho yamanje. Akuvusi okuthengwa okusha.
Isimo sibonakale siyisikwele?
Uma okuthengwa kuswele noma isimo sibonakale siyisikwele, buye uhlole kuGoogle Play.
Xhumana nokundlela
SD Maid kunesikhashane kuhlolwe i-Google Play, kodwa noma iyiphi okuthengwa ye-Pro ayikwazanga ukukhethwa nge-akhawunti esebenzisa i-Google Play kulolu hlelo.
Nasikhathi kusendlulele? Xhumana nokundlela kusuka ku-imeyile eyenzile okuthengwa kwaye faka inombolo yakho ye-oda ye-Google Play.
